linux--linux-terminal-fundamentals--draf.title: Linux Terminal Fundamentals
linux--linux-terminal-fundamentals--draf.description: A beginner-friendly Linux course focused on terminal navigation, files, folders, safe command habits, and workspace-based practice.
linux--linux-terminal-fundamentals--draf.moreComingSoon: More Linux Terminal Fundamentals lessons are coming soon.

linux-1-terminal-navigation.title: Terminal Navigation Basics
linux-1-terminal-navigation.description: Learn what the terminal is, how to know where you are, how to list files, and how to move between folders.
outcomes: Explain what a terminal command does.
Use pwd and ls to inspect the current location.
Use cd, ., .., and ~ to move around safely.
Create a simple folder map using terminal commands.
why: Builds confidence with terminal navigation basics.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

linux-2-files-and-folders.title: Files, Folders, and Viewing Content
linux-2-files-and-folders.description: Create, copy, move, rename, delete, and inspect files from the terminal.
outcomes: Create folders and files with mkdir, mkdir -p, and touch.
Copy, move, and rename files using cp and mv.
Use safe deletion habits with rm.
Inspect text files with cat, head, tail, and wc.
why: Builds confidence with files, folders, and viewing content.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

linux-3-final-capstone.title: Final Capstone: File Room Handoff
linux-3-final-capstone.description: Use the terminal to clean up a small real-world workspace and leave it ready for someone else.
outcomes: Inspect a workspace before changing it.
Create a clean folder structure for a real task.
Move, copy, rename, and remove files safely.
Verify the finished workspace with terminal commands.
why: Builds confidence with final capstone: file room handoff.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

linux--linux-terminal-fundamentals--draf.title: Terminal Orientation
linux--linux-terminal-fundamentals--draf.description: Learn what the terminal is, where am i? pwd and ls, moving around with cd through focused examples and practice.
bullets: Where Am I? pwd and ls

linux--linux-terminal-fundamentals--draf.title: Module Project
linux--linux-terminal-fundamentals--draf.description: Learn project: terminal map through focused examples and practice.

linux--linux-terminal-fundamentals--draf.title: File Workflow
linux--linux-terminal-fundamentals--draf.description: Learn creating folders and files, copy, move, and rename, viewing file contents through focused examples and practice.

linux--linux-terminal-fundamentals--draf.title: Module Project
linux--linux-terminal-fundamentals--draf.description: Learn project: notes organizer through focused examples and practice.

linux--linux-terminal-fundamentals--draf.title: Final Capstone
linux--linux-terminal-fundamentals--draf.description: Learn capstone: file room handoff through focused examples and practice.
